openingQuery: Help me pair a candle with something else

chat.content: Help me pair a candle with something else

The classic pairing is the Santal & Fig Candle ($92) alongside the Ceramic Bud Vase in Dusty Rose ($42). Together they come in just under $135, look like you planned it weeks ago, and both arrive wrapped in tissue with satin ribbon.

plan.flowSummary: Dispatcher → Curator + the-gift-table → find_pieces_hybrid (anchor candle + companion rerank)

toolCalls.description: Hybrid search anchored on candle plus companion gift
toolCalls.sql:
WITH vector_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vector_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
  LIMIT 20
),
fts_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, $2::tsquery) DESC) AS text_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
    AND description_tsv @@ $2::tsquery
  LIMIT 20
),
rrf AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(v.product_id, f.product_id) AS product_id,
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + v.vector_rank), 0) +
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + f.text_rank), 0) AS rrf_score
  FROM vector_results v
  FULL OUTER JOIN fts_results f USING (product_id)
)
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;
toolCalls.resultSummary: Reranked candle companion set to Santal & Fig Candle plus Ceramic Bud Vase

memoryPills.content: Pairing the candle with a companion gift
Recent searches mention 'for my mother'; bought a sundress as a birthday gift last month

telemetry.title: Intent → Curator
telemetry.description: 'pair a candle' routed as companion gift curation

telemetry.title: Memory Recall — Semantic
telemetry.description: Loaded Anna's gift-buyer profile from AgentCore Memory: gift-ready, artisanal, warm-neutral palette. Used to weight companion candidates.

telemetry.title: Memory Recall — Episodic
telemetry.description: Read Aurora episodic memory: recent 'for my mother' searches and last month's birthday-gift sundress purchase. Strengthens gift framing.
telemetry.sql: SELECT event_type, content, ts FROM customer_episodic_seed WHERE customer_id = $1 ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10;

telemetry.title: vector branch
telemetry.description: pgvector cosine over candle and home-gift candidates
telemetry.sql:
SELECT product_id, name, 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM product_catalog
WHERE quantity > 0
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 20;

telemetry.title: Postgres FTS branch
telemetry.description: literal candle and companion tokens over description_tsv
telemetry.sql:
SELECT product_id, name, ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, q) AS text_rank
FROM product_catalog, to_tsquery('english', 'candle:* | pair:* | vase:* | gift:*') q
WHERE quantity > 0 AND description_tsv @@ q
ORDER BY text_rank DESC
LIMIT 20;

telemetry.title: RRF merge
telemetry.description: Fused candle anchor and companion candidates
telemetry.sql:
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;

telemetry.title: cohere.rerank-v3-5:0
telemetry.description: Reranked for a two-piece gift set

telemetry.title: Memory Write — Working
telemetry.description: Wrote turn-scoped context to AgentCore Memory: pairing the candle with a companion gift.

sections.title: The pairing
paragraphs: This turn is where rerank earns its keep: the literal candle anchor stays fixed, while the companion piece is chosen for gift-readiness and visual fit.
